mapper.select: SELECT C.CUST_ID, C.CUST_NM, C.CUST_KN, C.CUST_PHONE, C.CUST_ADDRESS, C.CUST_INFOR_SECURITY, C.CUST_DISPATCH, M.MANAGER_NM FROM CUST_TBL C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MANAGER_CUST_ID, GROUP_CONCAT( MANAGER_NM ORDER BY MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD SEPARATOR '、' ) AS MANAGER_NM FROM MANG_TBL GROUP BY MANAGER_CUST_ID ) M ON M.MANAGER_CUST_ID = C.CUST_ID WHERE ORDER BY C.CUST_NM LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUST_TBL C WHERE

SELECT C.CUST_ID, C.CUST_NM, C.CUST_KN, C.CUST_WEB, C.CUST_POSTNO, C.CUST_ADDRESS, C.CUST_PHONE, C.CUST_FAX, C.CUST_MONEY, C.CUST_TYPE, C.CUST_STARTDT, C.CUST_INVOICE_NO, C.CUST_INFOR_SECURITY, C.CUST_DISPATCH, C.CUST_COMPANYREP, C.CUST_RMK1, C.CUST_GETDT, C.CUST_GETCDT, C.CUST_ORDERGDT, C.CUST_PAYDT, C.CUST_CLOSEDT, C.CUST_ORDERDT, C.BANK_CD, C.BANK_CHRCD, C.CUST_BANK_NM, C.CUST_BRANCH_CD AS CUST_BRANCH_NM, C.CUST_DEPOSITTYPE, C.CUST_BRANCHCD, C.CUST_ACCOUNTNO, C.CUST_NOMINEE, C.CUST_RMK2, C.CUST_CRD_USR, C.CUST_CRD_DT, C.CUST_UPD_USR, C.CUST_UPD_DT, M.MANAGER_NM, M.MANAGER_PNO, M.MANAGER_MAIL, M.MANAGER_JOB, M.MANAGER_RMK FROM CUST_TBL C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MANAGER_CUST_ID, GROUP_CONCAT( MANAGER_NM ORDER BY MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD SEPARATOR '、' ) AS MANAGER_NM, GROUP_CONCAT( MANAGER_PNO ORDER BY MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD SEPARATOR '、' ) AS MANAGER_PNO, GROUP_CONCAT( MANAGER_MAIL ORDER BY MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD SEPARATOR '、' ) AS MANAGER_MAIL, GROUP_CONCAT( MANAGER_JOB ORDER BY MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD SEPARATOR '、' ) AS MANAGER_JOB, GROUP_CONCAT( COALESCE(MANAGER_RMK, '') ORDER BY MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD SEPARATOR '、' ) AS MANAGER_RMK FROM MANG_TBL GROUP BY MANAGER_CUST_ID ) M ON M.MANAGER_CUST_ID = C.CUST_ID WHERE C.CUST_DELFLG = '0' AND C.CUST_ID = #{custId}
SELECT MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD, MANAGER_NM, MANAGER_CUST_ID, MANAGER_PNO, MANAGER_JOB, MANAGER_RMK, MANAGER_MAIL FROM MANG_TBL WHERE MANAGER_CUST_ID = #{custId} ORDER BY MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD
mapper.update: UPDATE CUST_TBL SET CUST_NM = #{custNm}, CUST_KN = #{custKn}, CUST_WEB = #{custWeb}, CUST_POSTNO = #{custPostno}, CUST_ADDRESS = #{custAddress}, CUST_PHONE = #{custPhone}, CUST_FAX = #{custFax}, CUST_MONEY = #{custMoney}, CUST_TYPE = #{custType}, CUST_STARTDT = #{custStartdt}, CUST_INVOICE_NO = #{custInvoiceNo}, CUST_INFOR_SECURITY = #{custInforSecurity}, CUST_DISPATCH = #{custDispatch}, CUST_COMPANYREP = #{custCompanyrep}, CUST_RMK1 = #{custRmk1}, CUST_GETDT = #{custGetdt}, CUST_GETCDT = #{custGetcdt}, CUST_ORDERGDT = #{custOrdergdt}, CUST_PAYDT = #{custPaydt}, CUST_CLOSEDT = #{custClosedt}, CUST_ORDERDT = #{custOrderdt}, BANK_CD = #{bankCd}, BANK_CHRCD = #{bankChrcd}, CUST_BANK_NM = #{custBankNm}, CUST_BRANCH_CD = #{custBranchNm}, CUST_DEPOSITTYPE = #{custDeposittype}, CUST_BRANCHCD = #{custBranchcd}, CUST_ACCOUNTNO = #{custAccountno}, CUST_NOMINEE = #{custNominee}, CUST_RMK2 = #{custRmk2}, CUST_UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId} AND CUST_DELFLG = '0'

UPDATE MANG_TBL SET MANAGER_NM = #{managerNm}, MANAGER_PNO = #{managerPno}, MANAGER_MAIL = #{managerMail}, MANAGER_JOB = #{managerJob}, MANAGER_RMK = #{managerRmk}, MANAGER_UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MANAGER_CD = #{managerCd} AND MANAGER_CHRCD = #{managerChrcd} AND MANAGER_CUST_ID = #{managerCustId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MANG_TBL ( MANAGER_CD, MANAGER_CHRCD, MANAGER_NM, MANAGER_CUST_ID, MANAGER_PNO, MANAGER_JOB, MANAGER_RMK, MANAGER_MAIL, MANAGER_CRD_USR, MANAGER_CRD_DT, MANAGER_UPD_USR, MANAGER_UPD_DT ) VALUES ( #{managerCd}, #{managerChrcd}, #{managerNm}, #{managerCustId}, #{managerPno}, #{managerJob}, #{managerRmk}, #{managerMail}, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'system', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
